ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium of instruction for the program */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for enrollment */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee structure for the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Additional admission requirements beyond the eligibility criteria */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact person for the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., Enrolled, Withdrawn) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the faculty member belongs */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the faculty member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in a program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program in which the student is enrolling */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Pending, Withdrawn) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific course within the program */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status for the enrollment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  "head_of_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)
